title: Crispy Herbs Argentinean Stir-Fry
description: A meal-prep Argentinian dish featuring crispy herbs with fettuccine noodles and braise for a halal-friendly option.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chicken slices to the pan and brown on both sides, around 5 minutes per side.
Remove chicken from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped green bell peppers and onions. Sauté for about 3-4 minutes until softened.
Return chicken to the pan with vegetables. Add cherry tomatoes, basil leaves, thyme leaves, and salt and pepper to taste.
Bring to a simmer and let it cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, boil fettuccine according to package instructions. Drain well and toss in the pan along with chicken mixture.
Serve hot as a main course.
Optional: garnish with more fresh herbs or serve with quinoa or rice.
